poll.question: After Marcus admits he can only promise today, Jade chooses to:

options.label: Accept one day
options.desc: Tell him it's enough—she'll choose him tomorrow too, same as him

options.label: Ask why he's scared
options.desc: Skip the commitment argument—dig into what's really behind his fear

options.label: Push for more
options.desc: Test whether he can find any way to promise something beyond today

in_play.label: Keep him close
in_play.desc: Pair off work — fishing, shelter — so Marcus is never alone. Support through structure
